case_title: MACKEY, LYNETTE vs. A & B PRODUCE COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MACKEY, LYNETTE AS TO DEFENDANT A & B PRODUCE COMPANY WARD, HERBERT SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUN-07-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-06-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAY-18-1993

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT A & B PRODUCE COMPANY

JUDGE JAMES MCBRIDE. JURY TRIAL CONT'D FROM 03/08/94 IN DEPT 03. ALL PARTIES, JUR PRESENT. WITNESSES SWORN AND EXAMINED, EXHIBITS TAKEN INTO EVIDENCE. ARGUEMENTS BY BOTH PARTIES. JURY REACHED A VERDICT. JUDGMENT FOR THE DEFENDANT. VEDICT WAS READ AND FILED. JURY POLLED, THANKED AND EXCUSED. EXHIBITS AND DEPOSITIONS WITHDRAWN. PLTF'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE THE JUDGMENT.
